heading: Remedy for infringement of plant variety protection
label: 2561 Remedy for infringement of plant variety protection
text: An owner shall have remedy by civil action for infringement of plant variety protection under . If a variety is sold under the name of a variety shown in a certificate, there is a prima facie presumption that it is the same variety.section 2541 of this title
notes: Amendments1994— struck out “his” before “plant” in first sentence.Pub. L. 103–349
Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective 180 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–349section 15 of Pub. L. 103–349section 2401 of this titleOct. 6, 1994
